comments.body:
## Description

Update 3 documentation files to reflect the new `--description`/`-d` flag on `ticket create`:

1. `CLAUDE.md` — ticket quick-reference table: add `-d/--description` to the create line
2. `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` — create section: add -d/--description to arguments table, usage string, and examples
3. `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-event-format.md` — CREATE data schema: add optional `description` field

SAFEGUARD FILE: CLAUDE.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-event-format.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] All three docs reference --description/-d
  Verify: grep -l 'description' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-event-format.md | wc -l  # expect 3
- [ ] CREATE event contract includes description field
  Verify: grep -A2 'description' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-event-format.md | grep -q 'string\|optional'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md, CLI reference, and event contract updated for --description/-d flag
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
